response.justification: Candidate has roughly 15+ years of software engineering experience with full-stack web, embedded, and some high-throughput backend work, which meets the baseline experience requirement. However, the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, cloud platform depth, and experience advising strategic customers — none of which are substantively evidenced. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP/agent tooling contributions, and there is no evidence of principal-level technical leadership, cloud platform strategy, or external thought leadership at the scale required.
strengths: ~15 years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founded and sustained an open-source geo-data platform, showing long-term ownership and Kubernetes deployment experience
Active in community knowledge sharing through workshops, talks, and courses on testing, TDD, and web internals
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research — only recent peripheral MCP tooling work
Lacks Principal/Director-level scope: no evidence of org-wide technical strategy, advising strategic customers, or shaping cloud product direction
Cloud expertise is shallow (AWS CDK mentioned once); no deep platform-level cloud architecture or multi-cloud strategy experience

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
No Principal/Director-level strategic leadership track record
Long, broad engineering tenure meeting 15-year baseline
